name: Jay Inslee
subject: For the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Thank you, Washington. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTg0Nzg1OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDc2NTQ3NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, **Thank you. Trudi and I are humbled and grateful -- and we 're ready to get to work.** Today is tough. I know it's hard to see right now, but I spent the last four years traveling around this beautiful state, and I know Washington will stand together for the values it has always stood for -- equality, equal opportunity, fairness, compassion, and inclusion. I love this state and I'm so proud of the values we stand for -- it's the highest honor to wake up every day working for you. Thank you for your vote to make sure our work continues for another four years. Yesterday, Washington voted to increase the minimum wage, provide paid sick leave for every worker and to take common sense steps to reduce gun violence. We voted for better schools, cleaner air, and for a state that opens its doors and celebrates its diversity because we know that our tolerance is our strength. I know -- and you do, too -- that there will be challenges in the next four years just as there were during the first four. We will tackle these issues, large and small, together. To those who knocked on doors and made calls for me, to those who dug deep and chipped in, to those who posted on social media and talked to their friends about voting: Thank you. Thank you. Thank you. We are a hopeful and optimistic state, and I know that as we work hard and stay focused we will do great things to move Washington forward. Let's get to work! Very truly yours, Jay Inslee
---

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=9847858&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTA0MDc2NTQ3NgS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: NHGOP Press
subject: NHGOP STATEMENT ON THE U.S. SENATE RACE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
NHGOP STATEMENT ON THE U.S. SENATE RACE

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: 11/9/2016
PRESS CONTACT: Ross Berry, Press@nhgop.org (
Press@nhgop.org%C2%A0 )

CONCORD -- New Hampshire Republican State Committee (NHGOP)
Chairman Jennifer Horn released the following statement on the
U.S. Senate race:

"Kelly Ayotte is one of the hardest working members of the U.S.
Senate. She has fought for New Hampshire families, for our small
businesses and, most importantly, our veterans. Not only has she
become one of the strongest leaders on issues of national
security, she has earned the respect of people on both sides of
the aisle.

"Kelly Ayotte is a woman of integrity and principle. She has
always done what was right for her neighbors across our state
regardless of the personal or political cost.

"Kelly Ayotte is the best that the political process has to offer
and I thank her for her dedication to the people of our state,
her service in the Senate and her commitment to our nation."

###

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee. www.nh.gop ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbeiogQOEF21kk979PrxHWjk-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mr-2Fgl8vK-2F-2F-2FZYnMPRf7An4MkEiYCxYnutKRG9B3Qzka3-2F3tT7BpDX4bnGZy8WoPC4trNMfW3B4k4LwRn2AmsYGUz9qt807PbPvxZx709ex1x4YJ3-2FO143lirGt2FaMMAwNTphTDV1d43k1hCGz6koIqwob-2FAND7XbTbd1dePFV5omqlwlVfnJXDeaKoGWbjRPyRPrP3CptRNwYvqqECGdlOMD6uEegiZiQesNNBVQHL-2BLxFa3-2Bb6OmA2NDGd9f88jX-2Fyr3pFSL7jQISwZ6cwQYg-3D-3D )

name: John Gregg
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Thank you for all that you helped us accomplish in this campaign. But more importantly, thank you for all that you will accomplish in the years to come.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1301460454076971008/-2819955354282620928)
---
Peter, Last year, I got into this race because I love Indiana. I love the people, the small towns, large cities and farmland. I love our work ethic, integrity, and can-do attitude. And I love the promise of a better Indiana that comes with each sunrise. Many of us were disappointed on Tuesday night, but in the morning, the sun rose and a new day arrived. And if you choose it to be -- today can be your day. It was because of you that this campaign raised more money than any campaign for Indiana governor in history. We earned bipartisan praise and endorsements from nearly every major newspaper in the state after people like you helped me develop a strategic plan to move Indiana forward. And so, today, my heart is full of optimism for the future -- your future. Because we all know that Indiana is a great place to live, work, and raise a family, yet we know it can be even better. My friend, Indiana still needs you and I know you will continue to answer the call. Thank you for all that you helped us accomplish in this campaign. But more importantly, thank you for all that you will accomplish in the years to come. John

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1301460454076971008/-2747897760244692992) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1301460454076971008/-2675840166206765056)
Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
---
Gregg for Indiana
PO Box 44224
Indianapolis IN 46244 United States

name: John Carney
subject: Building our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
body:
Friend,

Thank you very much for helping us win on Tuesday. It is a tremendous honor to be elected as your next governor. I promise to work every day to keep earning the trust you placed in me. And now the work begins.

Yesterday, I announced two key staff appointments in my administration. I'm proud to announce that Doug Gramiak will be serving as my chief of staff and Sheila Grant as my deputy chief of staff.

Being chief of staff may be the hardest job in state government, and it's certainly one of the most important. I’m excited that Doug has agreed to take on this critical role in my administration. He brings both the political and policy skills we need to put into action our plans to create jobs and improve our schools. And he’ll be a real asset in working with the legislature as we move quickly to address our state's budget challenges.

Like Doug, Sheila is one of my most trusted advisers. As my chief of staff in Washington, Sheila has been involved in the most important challenges facing our state. I couldn’t be happier that she has agreed to come back to Delaware to serve as deputy chief of staff. Sheila has an incredible ability to handle tough issues and get things done. She will be able to make a huge contribution in her new role as we prepare to hit the ground running in January.

I'm excited to continue working with Doug and Sheila as we build the rest of our team.

A transition website will be announced on Friday where interested individuals can submit resumes for positions in the administration.

Thank you again for your support. We couldn't have done it without you, and I look forward to your continued support throughout this transition.

Sincerely,

John

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
---------------------------------------------

Friends for John Carney
19 E Commons Blvd
2nd Floor
New Castle DE 19720 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/2904255661489520640/8402054443092148224.

name: Ben Carson
subject: This couldn't have happened without you
body:
Peter,

The mission of My Faith Votes in 2016 was to help turn out the 25
million registered Christian voters who decided to stay home in
2012.

Well guest what? 2016 saw the highest participation rate of
Christian voters in recent history. That's an incredible
achievement that would not have been possible without you.

None of this would have happened without your steadfast and
ongoing support, which allowed us to reach millions and millions
of our fellow Christians.

Whether it was our PSA's, our college campus recruitment or our
video campaign on social media, you had a hand in ensuring that
our goals were met.

You helped to prove that not only could our faith vote, but that
our faith matters.

I hope over the coming days you will join me in prayer not only
for our new President, but also for the millions of our fellow
believers who voted differently. We must strive to be one nation.

I also hope that you will continue to support the work of My
Faith Votes moving forward.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=103

We succeeded in getting Christians to the polls, but that doesn't
mean we should rest on our laurels. We've demonstrated the power
of our vote, and now is the time to wield our influence.

Ultimately, our work does not end with an election. It merely
begins.

I thank you for your incredible support and participation, and
look forward to working with you as we begin our very important
next chapter.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Donate:
myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=103

clean_body: Peter, The mission of My Faith Votes in 2016 was to help turn out the 25 million registered Christian voters who decided to stay home in 2012. Well guest what? 2016 saw the highest participation rate of Christian voters in recent history. That's an incredible achievement that would not have been possible without you. None of this would have happened without your steadfast and ongoing support, which allowed us to reach millions and millions of our fellow Christians. Whether it was our PSA's, our college campus recruitment or our video campaign on social media, you had a hand in ensuring that our goals were met. You helped to prove that not only could our faith vote, but that our faith matters. I hope over the coming days you will join me in prayer not only for our new President, but also for the millions of our fellow believers who voted differently. We must strive to be one nation. I also hope that you will continue to support the work of My Faith Votes moving forward. myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=103 We succeeded in getting Christians to the polls, but that doesn't mean we should rest on our laurels. We've demonstrated the power of our vote, and now is the time to wield our influence. Ultimately, our work does not end with an election. It merely begins. I thank you for your incredible support and participation, and look forward to working with you as we begin our very important next chapter. Sincerely, Ben Carson Donate: myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=103 Copyright © 2016 MyFaithVotes, All rights reserved MyFaithVotes | PO Box 1340 | Merrifield, VA 22116 This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 11, 2015. name: Beau Bayh
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50614/7be36b49/1e281154/78f96af7/1110530439/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

My father is the greatest man I have ever known. Throughout my life, he has taught me values of compassion, tolerance, and service. He is a man of exceptional character and faith, a man who has dedicated the majority of his life to helping people through public service. As Governor of and Senator from Indiana, he emphasized pragmatism and progress over division and partisanship. He worked across the aisle to balance the state budget, enact the largest tax cut for working families in state history, and make the dream of attending college a reality for tens of thousands of Hoosier children through the Twenty-First Century Scholars Program.

On Tuesday, my dad was defeated in the Indiana Senate race. Later on, when we were alone, my dad tried to apologize for letting me and everyone else down. I assured him that I loved him and had never been more proud to be his son.

To the selfless volunteers and supporters who contributed time and effort to the campaign, thank you from the bottom of my heart. You have given my family everything and asked for nothing in return. I will never forget the sacrifices you've made and the love and support you've provided us. Your idealism and passion give me hope for the future. To those who did not support my father, thank you for your participation and enthusiasm in our political process. Substantive political debate is foundational to a successful democracy.

Many may ask--where do we go from here? The campaign may be over, but we cannot abandon our message. We must alter the tribalistic, divisive nature of our politics. We must realize that despite our economic, racial, and religious differences, much more unites us than divides us. We must lead through hope and not through fear. We must protect the Constitution and ensure equal treatment of all Hoosiers and Americans regardless of what they look like, who they love, or how they worship. Finally, we must be willing to set aside ideological differences and find common ground with members of the other party. Many may be unhappy with yesterday's results, but please resist the temptation to give in to disillusionment and cynicism. Your voice matters now more than ever.

"We may have all come here in different ships, but we're in the same boat now." -- Martin Luther King Jr.

Best,

Beau Bayh
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50614/7be36b49/1e281154/78f96af6/1110530439/VEsE/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.
---

name: John Kasich
subject: The White House
body:
On Thursday, I traveled to Washington to celebrate the NBA
Championship win with the Cleveland Cavaliers at the White House.

Peter, today I traveled to
Washington to celebrate the NBA Championship win with the
Cleveland Cavaliers at the White House. This was a special honor
that I was able to share with my daughters.

Watch my remarks (here)

The election is over and while we
as Americans still face the same challenges that we did before
Tuesday, the things that unite us are much stronger than the
things that divide us.

I will be praying for
President-elect Trump's success and for his team's success in
what is perhaps America's greatest tradition; the peaceful
transition of power from one administration to the next.

Thank you for all of your hard
work to support Republican candidates up and down the ballot this
year. With your help, we held our majorities in Congress.

Our work is not done though as it
is now incumbent upon us all to do our part to begin the process
of healing America.

Sincerely,

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The work ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
This race was hard-fought and incredibly close, so I mean it when I say that each and every member of this community made a difference. From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
When I was a child, my WWII veteran father would look at his children across the breakfast table and ask, "What are you going to do for freedom today?" And he was serious. I've taken that question to heart, and I've fought for the prosperity and security of New Hampshire and America every day as Governor.
In the Senate, I will ask myself that same question and work to ensure our freedom and expand our success. I will fight to make college more affordable, cut small business taxes, and protect Social Security and Medicare. I will stand up against attempts to undermine _Roe v. Wade_ and work to fund efforts to fight the opioid epidemic.
I started my career in public service because I know that America is strongest when we bring in people from the margins and give all our families a chance to get ahead and stay ahead. In Washington, I will work with my fellow Senators on both sides of the aisle to find solutions to our nation's challenges and expand opportunities for all to share in our nation's prosperity.
This election has exposed great divisions in our nation, and I pledge to work every day to heal those rifts. Now more than ever, we need to bring New Hampshire common sense and bipartisanship to Washington. I will work with President-elect Trump when he's right and stand up to him when he's wrong to ensure that Washington is working for all Americans, not just those at the top.
There's a lot of work ahead, but I know that we can do it together.
With unending gratitude for your support,
With deep humility for the responsibility of the task before us,
With boundless optimism for the promise of America,
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddf4/2a380d31/14673cfe/ff26c6/2152373940/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: we did it, Maryland!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
While the hard work of the campaign has come to an end, the even harder challenge of trying to lead Maryland and America forward is just beginning. That task has been made even more challenging by the |
Friend,

Over the past year, you and other key supporters, have stepped up whenever we've needed your help and on Tuesday night, we completed our campaign journey together to win Maryland's U.S. Senate seat. Thank you!!!

While the hard work of the campaign has come to an end, the even harder challenge of trying to lead Maryland and America forward is just beginning. That task has been made even more challenging by the shocking upset in the presidential election.

I am committed to finding common ground whenever it is consistent with our values and the goal of ensuring America is an inclusive nation with equality, justice and opportunity for all. At the same time, I will vigorously fight any attempt to turn back the clock on the progress we have made. We must each do our part to continue to bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice and unite behind the common purpose of making sure every American is treated with dignity and respect, and has the opportunity to have a fair shake in our country.

Thank you for the privilege and the responsibility of working on behalf of our state and country in the United States Senate.

Let's get to work!

Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b47/70cdc2ba/473e8d41/3978378/3986318671/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em111016_1&source=em111016_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: You are not alone
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
This week the unimaginable happened, Donald Trump was elected president of the United States. It is unconscionable that so many in our broad and beautiful country are filled with a palpable fear for their safety and the safety of their loved ones.
Throughout his campaign, Trump emboldened a group of people to spew hatred and violence against some of our most vulnerable. Through insulting communities of color, demeaning women, disrespecting veterans, and advocating for unequal treatment of Muslims and other minority groups, some see the example Trump sets as a license to hate.
While there may be some opportunities to help working people during the Trump administration, we know that the manner in which Trump ran his campaign shows extreme danger may await some of our most vulnerable people. It is so important that we as a movement vigorously oppose any racist, sexist, xenophobic and anti-environment policies pursued by a President Trump.
**We need to know from you how you can help us organize under a Trump Administration. What are the fights you want us to prioritize? What's important to you?**
**[Tell us how and what you want Our Revolution to fight under President Donald Trump.](https://ourrevolution.com/how-do-you-want-lead-our-movement/ "https://ourrevolution.com/how-do-you-want-lead-our-movement/")**
At this moment, we need to come together and forge a path ahead. In the coming days, we will reach out to our communities all across the country and ask them, if they haven't already, to form organizing committees and create state plans, detailing what goals and changes they hope to see in their state. We will aid these committees in their strategies to protect the dignity and safety of our most.
We don't know yet specifically what will come first in a Trump Administration -- what kind of policies will target people of color, or women, or the working class. We don't know yet which fights will be in front of us.
We do know that we need to be ready for whatever comes. Our strength will be our unity and diversity.
**[Click here to tell us what Our Revolution should prioritize and how you can help fight Donald Trump's administration.](https://ourrevolution.com/how-do-you-want-lead-our-movement/ "https://ourrevolution.com/how-do-you-want-lead-our-movement/")**
All of us have the added responsibility of defending and protecting the basic rights and civil liberties of those who have been on the receiving end of the President-Elect's hate.
The political revolution will continue. It must be strong, It must be made up of thousands of people standing together to say "ENOUGH IS ENOUGH," it's time to take back our country from the billionaire class, and to protect the most vulnerable people in our country from Donald Trump's administration.
Thank you for being a part of our revolution.
In solidarity,
Shannon, Larry, Erika, Kyle, and millions of people who are part of Our Revolution.

****[TELL US HOW
YOU CAN FIGHT »](https://ourrevolution.com/how-do-you-want-lead-our-movement/ "https://ourrevolution.com/how-do-you-want-lead-our-movement/")****
** **
** **

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
